subcodes.first_line: O Mohsen! Every time We kindle the fire against Thee, Thou art not consumed. Thus have We ignited the Fire of Eternity upon the Temple of the Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محسن کلما اضرمنا علیک النار انک لاتشتعل اذا بعهنا نار الخلد علی هیکل اللوح
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
